incident.title: Checkout API returning 500 errors after 14:00
incident.description: Starting around 14:00 today, customers on shop test.myshopify.com are seeing 500 errors when submitting orders. The checkout API seems to be failing. We had a deployment of sama-api at 13:45.

description: Baseline fixture: checkout 500 after deploy. Root cause should mention the deployment at 13:45 as the likely trigger.
